description: Behavioral Scenario 1 says quotes are fetched only after the user enters quantity and cost basis, but req-portfolio-pnl-breakdown.md states quote fetch begins when a ticker is selected. Those two triggers produce different loading behavior for selected tickers with no holdings yet, so the quote-fetch contract is not implementable unambiguously.

evidence.snippet: When: User enters holding quantity and average cost basis per ticker / Then: The app fetches the latest quote for each selected ticker
